headings.usage: H1-H4 headings. Clean, modern, start-up friendly, with roundish geometry that fits the bubble aesthetic.

body.usage: Paragraphs, labels, and UI text. High legibility.

layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 lg:gap-8

voice_mic_orb.description: A floating, circular microphone button (bubble) for the voice talk feature.
voice_mic_orb.styles: w-20 h-20 md:w-24 md:h-24 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-tr from-indigo-500 to-rose-400 text-white shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(99,102,241,0.5)] flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer
voice_mic_orb.animation: Use Framer Motion to scale [1, 1.1, 1] infinitely when active (listening). When inactive, add a slow floating translation.

step_progress_bubble_map.description: Navigation step indicator mimicking connected bubbles.
step_progress_bubble_map.styles: flex items-center gap-2 md:gap-4 mb-8 md:mb-12 justify-center
step_progress_bubble_map.item_active: w-10 h-10 md:w-12 md:h-12 rounded-full bg-indigo-600 text-white flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg font-bold transition-all
step_progress_bubble_map.item_inactive: w-8 h-8 md:w-10 md:h-10 rounded-full bg-white/50 backdrop-blur text-indigo-900 border border-white/50 flex items-center justify-center transition-all

bento_cards.description: Used in Step 2 (Problem Selection) and Step 4 (Grants/Support).
bento_cards.styles: glass_panel + rounded-3xl p-6 md:p-8 flex flex-col h-full cursor-pointer relative overflow-hidden

charts.styling: Use curved lines for LineCharts (type='monotone'). Apply gradient fills for AreaCharts (using SVG linearGradient) matching the pastel theme (indigo to mint). Hide cartesian grid or use highly transparent dashed lines. Background of chart containers must be glass_panel.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text primary (#1E1B4B) is used over glass panels for high readability.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='voice-orb-btn', data-testid='step-2-card').

background_blobs_css.description: Render absolute positioned SVG or pure CSS blur blobs in the background behind the main router outlet/content.
background_blobs_css.implementation: Use 3-4 divs with classes like `absolute w-96 h-96 bg-indigo-200 rounded-full mix-blend-multiply filter blur-3xl opacity-50` placed at different corners.

app_flow_instructions: Step 1: Input Idea. Large textarea + Voice Mic Orb. Output -> analyze idea.
Step 2: World Problems. AI generates 3-4 problem statements (Bento Grid cards). User clicks one.
Step 3: Refined Idea & Analysis. Split view. Left: user's refined idea. Right: AI feedback (Novelty score, Competitors, Learning Path).
Step 4: Support & Resources. Horizontal scroll or grid of Govt Sites / Financial Grants matching the domain.

Step 5: Final Dashboard. Contains: 1) Years to Success (Recharts Line/Area). 2) Viability Score (Recharts Radial/Pie). 3) Funding Required Bar Chart comparing 'Home vs Company vs With-Employees' setup.
